title: Gemini 开放内测名额招募
full_text:
Josh Woodward on X: "Want unreleased @GeminiApp features before anyone else? Love breaking, testing, and shaping new tech?
We're opening a limited number of slots for power users to join the Gemini Trusted Tester program.
Sign up here: https://t.co/kSsRsavJPv https://t.co/6sxYCb8S0y" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Josh Woodward
@joshwoodward
Want unreleased @ GeminiApp features before anyone else? Love breaking, testing, and shaping new tech?
We're opening a limited number of slots for power users to join the Gemini Trusted Tester program.
Sign up here: goo.gle/4onCRHq
11:31 PM · Jun 15, 2026 72.6K Views
